scripts.check: node --check src/auth.js && node --check src/packages/package-catalog.js && node --check src/packages/package-store.js && node --check src/packages/credit-on-order.js && node --check src/packages/message-templates.js && node --check src/packages/package-analytics.js && node --check src/packages/payment-store.js && node --check src/packages/visual-standards.js && node --check src/packages/deliverable-store.js && node --check src/pdf/pdf-manifest.js && node --check src/pdf/pdf-store.js && node --check src/suppliers/supplier-catalog.js && node --check src/suppliers/supplier-store.js && node --check src/ai/package-advisor.js && node --check src/ai/ai-observability.js && node --check functions/api/packages.js && node --check functions/api/message-templates.js && node --check functions/api/analytics.js && node --check functions/api/payments.js && node --check functions/api/payments/[pid].js && node --check functions/api/deliverable-specs.js && node --check functions/api/deliverables/[did].js && node --check functions/api/orders/[id]/engagements.js && node --check functions/api/orders/[id]/engagements/[eid].js && node --check functions/api/orders/[id]/engagements/[eid]/deliverables.js && node --check functions/api/orders/[id]/pdf/uploads.js && node --check functions/api/orders/[id]/pdf/drafts.js && node --check functions/api/suppliers.js && node --check functions/api/suppliers/[sid]/price-lists.js
